name: full-team
description: Meta-plugin: installs the complete solo-suite team in one step. Depends on all 17 component plugins (solo, stack, project, design, dev, test, release, docs, site-doctor, git, spec, repo, security, browser, gate, ai, growth) — each of which remains individually installable. Command: /full-team:verify checks that every component plugin is present and reports what is missing.
